name: Forbidden Droplet
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>禁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>じられた<ruby lang="jp"><rb>一</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひと</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>滴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しずく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send any number of other cards from your hand and/or field to the GY; choose that many Effect Monsters your opponent controls, and until the end of this turn, their ATK is halved, also their effects are negated. In response to this card's activation, your opponent cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with the same original type (Monster/Spell/Trap) as the cards sent to the GY to activate this card. You can only activate 1 "Forbidden Droplet" per turn.
eff: Send any number of other cards from your hand and/or field to the GY; choose that many Effect Monsters your opponent controls, and until the end of this turn, their ATK is halved, also their effects are negated. In response to this card's activation, your opponent cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with the same original type (Monster/Spell/Trap) as the cards sent to the GY to activate this card. You can only activate 1 "Forbidden Droplet" per turn.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
